__doc__: Tag-site scoring config. Score = weighted sum of the criteria below; each
criterion adds `weight` points to a residue when its test passes (missing
TO EDIT AN EXISTING SCORE: change its `weight` (0 disables it), `label`
(shown when a residue fails it), or the values in `params` (e.g. thresholds).
This is the ONLY file you touch for that.
TO ADD A NEW SCORE: add a criterion object below. If it uses one of the
reagent_min_above | flank_small_fraction) you edit ONLY this file. A brand-new
kind of test needs one new handler function in utils/scoring.py (SCORE_HANDLERS).
column_below:          analysis (aa_df column type, e.g. 'plddt'/'blast'), threshold
reagent_min_above:     columns (list of reagents TSV columns), threshold
flank_small_fraction:  small_aa (string of residue letters), window, fraction

criteria.label: in domain
criteria.note: 1 pt if residue is outside all Pfam/Phobius domains

criteria.label: in modification
criteria.note: 1 pt if not inside a known PTM/modification site

criteria.label: in hydrophobic patch
criteria.note: 1 pt if not inside a hydrophobic surface patch

criteria.label: pLDDT>0.5
criteria.note: 1 pt if AlphaFold pLDDT is below threshold (disordered/flexible)

criteria.label: SJD>0.5
criteria.note: 1 pt if BLAST conservation (SJD) is below threshold

criteria.label: no guide<5bp
criteria.note: 1 pt if a CRISPR guide cut site is within `threshold` bp

criteria.label: near splice site
criteria.note: 1 pt if the nearest splice site is at least `threshold` bp away

criteria.label: few small flanking
criteria.note: 1 pt if >`fraction` of the +/-`window` flank are small AAs
